description: Bypass student panel — never cache authenticated HTML
expression: (http.host eq "rostami.app" or http.host eq "www.rostami.app") and (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/panel")

description: Bypass admin panel — never cache authenticated HTML
expression: (http.host eq "rostami.app" or http.host eq "www.rostami.app") and (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/admin")
(http.host eq "rostami.club" or http.host eq "www.rostami.club" or http.host eq "rostami.app") and (http.request.uri.path eq "/family" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/family/")

description: Bypass dynamic APIs — forms, chat, captcha, revalidate, SSO
expression: (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/chatbot") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/captcha") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/revalidate") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/admin") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api/v1") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/purchase") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/apply") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/sso") or (http.request.uri.path starts_with "/telegram")

description: Long-cache legacy media paths on site host
Public HTML on rostami.app — eligible + respect CDN-Cache-Control
expression: (http.host eq "rostami.app" or http.host eq "www.rostami.app") and (http.request.method eq "GET") and (not http.request.uri.path starts_with "/panel") and (not http.request.uri.path starts_with "/admin") and (not http.request.uri.path starts_with "/family") and (not http.request.uri.path starts_with "/api") and (not http.request.uri.path starts_with "/purchase") and (not http.request.uri.path starts_with "/apply") and (not http.request.uri.path starts_with "/sso") and (http.request.uri.path eq "/" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/insights" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/articles" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/transformations" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/faq" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/courses" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/founder" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/mini-courses" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/events" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/guides" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/resources" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/seminars" or http.request.uri.path eq "/sitemap.xml" or http.request.uri.path starts_with "/sitemaps" or http.request.uri.path eq "/robots.txt" or http.request.uri.path eq "/llms.txt")
